responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription & Translation: A Detailed Examination**

Right, let's get down to it. They want subtitles for this video segment, and it's my job to make them perfect. First, I'm analyzing the audio. The video kicks off with the "Baka Mitai" cover by Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin.  I meticulously listened and transcribed the Japanese lyrics, ensuring precise timing. I checked the timestamps and verified against the lyrics in the reference document.

From the intro, I noted the following: "Now that I'm alone, three years have passed, and even the city streets have changed. And yet... And yet, why are only lingering attachments left behind? You really are not a good man. Our matching rings... I'll take them off. Serves you right. I feel so relieved. No matter how long I wait... I'm such a fool."

Then, a bit of instrumental, silence. Okay, nothing to subtitle there. Good.

The song continues: "It's no good. No good. It's no good at all. I love you, I love you... way too much. No matter how much strong alcohol I drink, these unyielding memories are just foolish. You really are not a good man. Our matching rings... I'll take them off. Serves you right. I feel so relieved. What's with these tears? I'm such a fool."

After that, instrumental again, silence, good. Then, it transitions into spoken dialogue. That's where it gets interesting, as Cecilia and Gigi shift to English. I went through the entire segment to verify all the spoken lines: "Whoa, yeah, yeah! Musicals is where it's at! I think... I think this could really be... This is gonna get us the big dollars! Yeah, hopefully the big mouse is not gonna shoot us in the head. Ten billion dollars! What big mouse? Ten... don't worry about it. Ten billion dollars! Yeah, it's really good. We might need like a different type of show too, you know? Just for variety, so they can't shut us down. A variety show? Yeah! Like a variety game show? Yeah! The Autofister Games! The Autofister... physical games! Physicals! One hundred and five!"

A brief black screen, silent. Then: "But first, a word from our sponsors! Whoa! Slow down there, partner! Hold your horses! Don't you think you're scrolling a little too fast? Yeah, put down the phone and full screen our video instead because... ...we are about to show you the new hottest thing in town! Introducing the... Autofister... Network! Get it? 'Cause it's Autofister Network, but this is our merch! We wanted to take this opportunity to show you all of our cool, fun merch before it goes live! We've got Cemimis! Gimimis! Grems! Otomos! And this neat acrylic stand of the both of us! Yay! And if you hurry up, you'll even be able to get... ...the limited set with a postcard signed by both of us! Woohoo! It will be live at these exact... ...times, so make sure to check it out then! Coming soon to a stream near you!"

There's some more static, silence. Then: "And we're back from our commercial break! Thank you everyone for waiting! Yeah! Welcome back to the official... ...Autofister..." and the video cuts off.

I checked all text, double-checked the custom words, verified timecode boundaries for each line, and verified all timestamps. The translation is precise. Everything is spotless. Ready to deliver the final results.
